data.name: SoleDrop-CTF-Box2-PolymorphicJA4
data.description: Polymorphic bot: one JA4 TLS fingerprint behind >=6 distinct User-Agents in the window (UA rotation, constant TLS handshake = Python requests). CTF flag JA4 t13d1812h1_85036bcba153_b26ce05bbdd6. MITRE T1036.005 / T1595.002; ATLAS AML.T0035. Source: Cloudflare HTTP Requests (class_uid=4002).

scheduledParams.query: dataSource.name='Cloudflare' dataSource.cloudflare_dataset='HTTP Requests' http_request.url.hostname contains '.lab.soledrop.co' tls.ja3_hash.value=* http_request.user_agent=* | group distinct_uas=estimate_distinct(http_request.user_agent), hits=count(), distinct_paths=estimate_distinct(http_request.url.path), src_ips=estimate_distinct(src_endpoint.ip), first_seen=oldest(timestamp), last_seen=newest(timestamp), src_ip=any(src_endpoint.ip) by ja3=tls.ja3_hash.value | filter distinct_uas >= 6 | columns ja4, distinct_uas, distinct_paths, hits, src_ips, src_ip, first_seen, last_seen | sort -distinct_uas | limit 100
